description: Hospitality borrower (NAICS 72) with base DSCR 1.50 (passes) but stressed 1.20 (fails the 1.40 hospitality floor)
regulatory_basis: Interagency Leveraged Lending Guidance (OCC/FRB/FDIC SR 13-3) — hospitality requires elevated 1.40x DSCR floor; stressed DSCR fails the floor and triggers downgrade review
